description: Marriage contract (ketubba). In the hand of Yosef b. Shemuel b. Seʿadya. Cut into an unusual octopus-like shape: a comb spine lining? Cf. T-S NS 305.206, T-S NS 297.103–06, and https://blogs.lib.ku.edu/spencer/manuscript-of-the-month-manuscript-waste-not-or-a-case-in-fragmentology/. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
